verify_contact_panel_desc: Use this page to confirm a registration activation or an email-change request.
verify_contact_panel_hint: If the link has expired, resend it from the sign-in page or security settings.
verify_contact_verifying_desc: Please wait while this contact verification request is being confirmed.
verify_contact_redirecting_hint: You will be redirected automatically after verification. Do not refresh or close this page.
verify_contact_missing_token_desc: This link does not contain a usable verification token, so there is nothing to confirm.
verify_contact_invalid_desc: This link may be invalid, already used, or replaced by a newer email. To activate your account, resend the activation email from the sign-in page. To confirm an email change, resend the confirmation from security settings.
verify_contact_expired_desc: This link has expired. To activate your account, resend the activation email from the sign-in page. To confirm an email change, resend the confirmation from security settings.
verify_contact_error_desc: The server did not finish processing this verification. Try again in a moment.
verify_contact_success_register_desc: {{target}} is now activated. You can sign in immediately.
verify_contact_success_change_desc: The new email {{target}} has been confirmed and applied.
